$comment: TIP-1.0 authoritative capability catalog. Every label a TokenPak-compatible component MAY publish during MCP capability negotiation or via X-TokenPak-Capability header. Instance validates against schemas/tip/capabilities.schema.json. See docs/protocol/tip-capabilities.md for normative semantics.

labels.description: Component performs TIP-1.0 context compression before dispatch. Reduces token count without altering semantic content. Providers observe the compressed form; cache keys are computed post-compression.
Component preserves exact request-body byte-identity on passthrough paths (no JSON re-serialization). Required where billing routing depends on body bytes (e.g. Anthropic OAuth cache_control).
Component observes but does NOT manage provider-side cache_control. Attributes hits as origin='client' in telemetry rows per the attribution contract.
Component places deterministic cache_control breakpoints on its own authority. Hits credited as origin='proxy' in telemetry rows.
Component enforces Anthropic's 1h-before-5m cache_control TTL ordering rule on outbound bodies; strips default-TTL blocks that violate the rule.
Component classifies every request into a canonical RouteClass (claude-code-*, anthropic-sdk, openai-sdk, generic) and drives downstream behavior via Policy presets rather than ad-hoc branching.
Component honors provider fallback chains declared in manifests; emits telemetry when a fallback fires.
Component runs an outbound secret scan (DLP) and respects Policy.dlp_mode (off/warn/redact/block). Redact modes auto-downgrade to warn on byte-preserve routes.
Component forwards only the header set permitted by the profile; drops hop-by-hop + Content-Encoding after auto-decompression.

Component writes one telemetry row per forwarded request to a TIP-1.0-compliant store. Rows carry cache_origin, route_class, and the cost/token attribution fields from schemas/tip/telemetry-event.schema.json.
Component records companion-side (pre-wire) savings entries with entry_type='companion_savings'; local UX state only, never a source of truth for billing/cache.
Component runs a UserPromptSubmit hook that may inject vault/capsule context and mutate the outbound prompt via additionalContext. Fires before Claude Code assembles the byte-preserved body.

Component reads + injects local session capsules from ~/.tokenpak/companion/capsules/. Capsules are local UX state (§5.2-C); contents never cross the machine boundary except as injected prompt context.
Component maintains a local session journal (~/.tokenpak/companion/journal.db) with entry_type set from the TIP vocabulary {pre_send, companion_savings, ...}. Journal rows are local UX state.
Component renders a pre-send cost/token preview to stderr or TUI status line. Local only; no network side effects.
Component implements the MCP control-plane substrate via services/mcp_bridge/ (shared plumbing). Model inference MUST NOT occur in MCP tools; they are local helpers.
Component presents aggregated telemetry for a human. Reads authoritative stores; never writes; never invokes providers.
